# ADR-0005: Duplicate decision section

## Status

Accepted, 2026-01-03.

## Context

Some situation prompted a decision.

## Decision

We will do the first thing.

## Decision

We will also do the second thing.

## Alternatives Considered

- Not doing either thing. Rejected.

## Consequences

Two conflicting decision sections make review ambiguous.
